executive_summary: Today's top VC sourcing signals for 2026-04-19 indicate a balanced split between India and Southeast Asia, with multiple stealth mode founders emerging across various sectors. The strongest archetypes are predominantly unknown or first-time founders, although none have yet to demonstrate a clear second-time founder or L1/L2 exit profile. Notable leads include Ankit Sharma, who is exploring SaaS/AI opportunities, and Cento Ventures, which is focused on logistics and distribution in Indonesia, both scoring 45 on our rubric. While none of the signals have crossed the 60 threshold, these two leads warrant further investigation due to their sector alignment and geographic relevance to our investment mandate.

persons.name: Ankit Sharma
persons.investment_thesis: Ankit Sharma has launched a new AI agent service leveraging email, indicating potential product innovation in the SaaS/AI space. While experience and location are unknown, the focus on a trending sector warrants further investigation to understand his background and the traction of this new venture.
